Title: Verify Email
User Story: As a user who forgot a password, I want to reset it via email, so that I can regain account access.
Acceptance Criteria: The system should verify user's emails before allowing them to log in for the first time.

Title: Tailor Versions
User Story: As a user, I want tailored versions of articles so that I can understand complex topics at my current level of knowledge.
Acceptance Criteria:
The system tailors articles based on user’s reading history.
Frequent readers of a topic receive shorter, less basic articles.
Notes: have button to tailor the article to simplify and then also have roadmaps based on user's reading history

Title: Switch Levels
User Story: As a user, I want to switch between complexity levels (beginner/intermediate/expert) so that I can choose the detail I need.
Acceptance Criteria:
Each article can be simplified into 3 levels: beginner, intermediate, expert.
Switching levels updates the text instantly.
Simplified text preserves the key facts of the original.
Notes: have button to simplify article but doesn't tailor between the three levels

Title: Highlight Technical Terms
User Story: As a user, I want technical terms highlighted so that I can easily spot unfamiliar words.
Acceptance Criteria:
The system automatically highlights jargon or complex terms.
Highlighted terms have consistent visual formatting.

Title: Article Recommendations
User Story: As a user, I want recommendations based on my reading history so that I discover new articles.
Acceptance Criteria:
The system suggests 3–5 related articles per session.
Recommendations are displayed below or alongside the current article.

Title: Feedback on Recommendations
User Story: As a user, I want to give feedback on recommendations so that the system improves future suggestions.
Acceptance Criteria:
Users can mark recommendations as “useful” or “not useful.”
Feedback updates the recommendation model.

Title: Avoid Duplicate Recommendations
User Story: As a user, I don’t want to be recommended articles I’ve already read so that my feed stays fresh.
Acceptance Criteria: Articles already read are not recommended again.
Notes: can add to read history and nothing from read history goes to roadmaps

Title: Keyword Search
User Story: As a user, I want to search by keyword so that I can find specific topics.
Acceptance Criteria:
The search bar accepts text queries.
Results appear within 2 seconds.
Search results show title, source, and snippet.

Title: Filter by Date
User Story: As a user, I want to filter by date so that I can find the latest news.
Acceptance Criteria:
Users can select a date range.
Only articles within the range are displayed.

Title: Trending Topics
User Story: As a user, I want trending topics suggested so that I can see what’s popular.
Acceptance Criteria:
A trending list shows the top 5 most-read topics.
Trending topics update at least once per hour.
Notes: trending topics on the home page

Title: Feedback on Tailored Articles
User Story: As a user, I want to give quick Yes/No feedback on simplified articles so that the system can improve how it adjusts content for my reading level.
Acceptance Criteria:
Each simplified article displays a Yes/No clarity question.
The system records the user’s response.
Feedback is stored and linked to the user’s profile.
Negative feedback triggers a suggestion to try a different complexity level.
Notes: not realistic for usage/development stage of app right now

Title: Feedback on Definitions
User Story: As a user, I want to flag unclear definitions so that the system can improve the quality of explanations.
Acceptance Criteria:
Each definition includes a “Flag as unclear” option.
Flagged definitions are stored with user ID and timestamp.
Admins can review flagged definitions via an internal dashboard.
Users receive a confirmation that their feedback has been submitted.
Notes: our advisor didn't think this should've been the focus with getting the model up and running

Title: Continuous Improvement
User Story: As a platform administrator, I want all feedback to be logged and used to retrain AI models so that article simplifications and definitions continuously improve.
Acceptance Criteria:
The system logs feedback from simplifications and flagged definitions.
Logs include feedback type, timestamp, and user profile ID (anonymized if required).
Feedback is exportable for model training.
Retraining is performed on a scheduled basis (e.g., weekly).
Notes: not really training a model, just making calls, find a way to store feedback and pass it - not feasible for this project

Title: Breaking News Alerts
User Story: As a user, I want to receive breaking news alerts within my subscribed topics so that I stay updated in real time.
Acceptance Criteria:
Breaking news is detected and alerts are sent within 5 minutes of publication.
Alerts are delivered by push notification or email depending on user preference.
Alerts include article title, source, and link.
Duplicate alerts for the same event are not sent.
Notes: weekly alerts on selected alert topics

Title: Manage Alerts
User Story: As a user, I want to manage my news alerts so that I only receive notifications that are relevant to me.
Acceptance Criteria:
Users can enable or disable alerts in settings.
Disabled topics stop generating notifications immediately.
Users can choose delivery method (email, push, none).
Changes to alert settings are applied instantly.
Notes: can choose diff topics for alerts
